positive: A minimalist, highly stylized silhouette illustration of interwoven celestial elements—crescent moons, gentle nebula clouds, and stylized constellations—forming a continuous, symmetrical tapestry. The aesthetic should resemble elegant woodblock print art meets cosmic geometry. Utilize deep indigo blues, shimmering gold accents, and stark white negative space for extreme contrast. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed with clean, scalable lines, ideal for repeating apparel patterns. Focus on crisp edges and strong, recognizable forms, emphasizing negative space for maximum print impact. Highly detailed, linework style, graphic design quality, vector art precision.
